description_long: This is a compact, two-seater couch with a boxy, modern silhouette and a solid brown color. The couch features thick, squared armrests and a continuous, straight backrest that matches the height of the armrests. The seat consists of a single, wide cushion that appears slightly indented from use, while the backrest is integrated and not divided into separate cushions. The upholstery is plain, with visible wear and scuff marks, giving it a slightly distressed appearance. The legs are not visible, suggesting they are either recessed or the couch sits directly on the ground, contributing to its blocky profile.
description: A small, boxy brown couch with thick armrests, a single seat cushion, and a continuous backrest. The upholstery is plain and shows signs of wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, squared armrest and the solid, blocky profile of the couch.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the single seat cushion, continuous backrest, and both armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, with the same thick armrest and blocky shape.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain, unadorned backrest and the full width of the couch.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: One wide, attached seat cushion and a continuous, integrated backrest; no visible accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid brown upholstery with a plain, slightly distressed texture and visible scuff marks; no decorative stitching or patterns.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are not visible, suggesting a recessed or hidden base with no exposed design features.
attribute_armrest_design: Thick, squared armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a straight, boxy profile and no additional padding or ornamentation.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest integrated with the armrests, not divided or tufted, and matching the armrest height.
